name: Terrazzo Calculator
seo_description: Calculate terrazzo tiles and base mortar for thick-bed installation. Free construction calculator.
example_label: Calculate terrazzo tiles 40x40cm for 45m² including bedding mortar.
result_context: To {area} m² with baldosas of {tam_pieza_cm}×{tam_pieza_cm}cm se need {baldosas_ud} baldosas ({baldosas_cajas} cajas), {mortero_kg} kg of mortar and {juntas_kg} kg of fragüe.
formula_display: Baldosas = area ÷ (lado_m × lado_m); Mortero = area × 15 kg/m²
mistakes: No remojar The baldosas of terrazo antes of colocar (absorben water)
No pulir and sellar después of colocado si es terrazo continuo
description: Terrazzo Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Terrazzo Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
